title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer, claims that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He argues that humanity must accept that it is no longer the only intelligent species on Earth.
